faqs.question: What service options are available for the Ultimate Spa Experience at Leaf Spa | Fairmont Chicago?
faqs.answer: The Ultimate Spa Experience! 50-Minute Massage, Facial or Couples Massage at Leaf Spa | Fairmont Chicago offers four options: a 50 Minute Massage Spa Package, a 50 Minute Facial Spa Package with Peel and LED Therapy, a 50 Minute Massage and 50 Minute Facial Spa Package, and a 50 Minute Couples Massage with Enhancements & Private Relaxation Room.

faqs.question: What does the 50 Minute Facial Spa Package at Leaf Spa at The Fairmont Chicago include?
faqs.answer: The 50 Minute Facial Spa Package includes a peel and LED Therapy as part of the facial treatment. It is one of the service options available under the Ultimate Spa Experience offering.

faqs.question: What is included in the Couples Massage option at Leaf Spa at The Fairmont Chicago?
faqs.answer: The 50 Minute Couples Massage option includes enhancements and access to a Private Relaxation Room. This makes it a distinct experience compared to the individual massage and facial packages.

faqs.question: Where is Leaf Spa at The Fairmont Chicago located?
faqs.answer: Leaf Spa at The Fairmont Chicago is located at 200 North Columbus Drive in the Chicago Loop area of Chicago, IL 60601.

faqs.question: Is there an option that combines both a massage and a facial at Leaf Spa at The Fairmont Chicago?
faqs.answer: Yes, the 50 Minute Massage and 50 Minute Facial Spa Package combines both treatments into a single booking. This option provides a full 50 minutes for each service.

faqs.question: What is included in the 50-minute massage at Leaf Spa Chicago?
faqs.answer: The 50-minute massage includes a full therapeutic session with a licensed massage therapist, access to the spa facilities including steam room and relaxation areas, and complimentary amenities such as robes, slippers, tea, water, and champagne. Visitors consistently report receiving professional, attentive massage service with the option to add enhancements like scalp treatments or hot stones for an additional fee.

faqs.question: Is Leaf Spa Chicago good for couples massages?
faqs.answer: Leaf Spa offers dedicated couples massage experiences in a serene setting with professional therapists trained in synchronized treatment. Multiple visitors report the couples massage as a memorable, relaxing experience with high-quality service, though facilities such as saunas are gender-separated rather than shared.

faqs.question: Are there hidden fees or extra charges at Leaf Spa Chicago?
faqs.answer: A service charge of approximately 20% is applied to the package price at checkout, separate from the base Groupon deal cost. Add-on treatments such as scalp enhancements or hot stones incur additional fees beyond the included massage or facial. Visitors recommend reviewing the full pricing breakdown before booking to avoid surprises at the time of service.

images.quality_assessment: Strong visual asset support with 48 total images. Alt texts show some descriptive quality for main product images (e.g., 'Ultimate Spa Experience! 50-Minute Massage, Facial or Couples Massage at Leaf Spa | Fairmont Chicago! - Primary Image') but many are generic numbered references (Image 2-7) rather than descriptive. Related deal carousel alt texts are more specific (e.g., 'Unwind and Relax: Scalp or Body Massage for 1 or 2 at Utopia Spa'). Overall quantity is good but descriptive consistency could improve.

reviews.text: Place was incredible did a couples massage and it was a really great experience , I wish it had never ended , they did a fabulous job and everything was very relaxing !

reviews.text: Erin and Vanessa were absolutely fantastic - professional, attentive to my asks, and very sweet! The location is very well maintained, facilities are absolutely stunning! Tee, water, and champagne were available, and the relaxation room was lovely!
